reason: Backend pre-development checklist for search/storage changes.
Preserve layer boundaries between API, search orchestration, state, and storage.
Respect vector-store contracts and persistence compatibility while extending Qdrant query behavior.
Map Qdrant ANN failures to safe fallback or structured service errors.
Keep ANN observability low-cardinality and avoid sensitive query/vector logging.
Guide focused tests and regression expectations for search behavior.
Load cross-layer and code-reuse thinking guides.
Original Qdrant backend scope and explicit deferral of remote ANN search.
Existing Qdrant storage contract and compatibility boundaries.
Current Qdrant payload and sync semantics that ANN search will rely on.
Latest Qdrant collection consistency and rollback semantics.
